---
name: "Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an enhancement that adds value to internal workflows"
title: "[FEAT] <short summary>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement
What problem or need do we want to address? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature at a high level.

## Goals & Non-Goals
- Goals:
- Non-goals:

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Alternatives Considered
List options and why they were not chosen.

## Risks / Dependencies
- Dependencies on external packages, data sources, or APIs

## Metrics / Success Indicators
How will success be measured? (e.g., reduced drawdown, improved Sharpe ratio)

## Additional Context
Mockups, example commands, prior art, references.
